bullets: Building a RAG-based financial document intelligence system that lets the investment team run semantic search and signal extraction across years of unstructured PE deal memos, sector reports, and meeting notes.

Designing scalable retrieval pipelines on vector databases — hybrid semantic + keyword search to surface historically relevant deals during live evaluation, cutting time-to-context from hours to minutes.
Automating internal investment workflows with agentic AI — the agent drafts initial deal screens, flags portfolio overlaps, and routes the analyst directly to the relevant precedent.
Led the analytics transformation of Enterprise Asset Management (EAM) systems for Oil & Gas, Aviation, and Healthcare clients — deployed ML models that improved operational efficiency by 10%.
Integrated real-time telemetry pipelines with HxGN EAM Databridge Pro and Apache Kafka, building the underlying datasets for downstream predictive maintenance models.
Built and shipped 15+ SQL and Tableau dashboards, reducing reporting latency by 40% and moving clients from reactive reporting to proactive asset-health monitoring.
Mentored 3 junior analysts — accelerated their onboarding and improved overall team throughput.
Engineered SQL-based automation pipelines for financial and regulatory reporting, accelerating period-end close.
Led data quality initiatives using Posidex and fuzzy matching for deduplication — improved underlying data accuracy by 30%.
Performed foundational EDA on cloud workload patterns to optimize resource allocation, cutting infrastructure costs by 25%.
